heading: Report on compliance with prohibition on importation of goods made with convict, forced, or indentured labor
label: 4453 Report on compliance with prohibition on importation of goods made with convict, forced, or indentured labor

children.text: The number of instances in which merchandise was denied entry pursuant to that section during the 1-year period preceding the submission of the report.
A description of the merchandise denied entry pursuant to that section.
Such other information as the Commissioner considers appropriate with respect to monitoring and enforcing compliance with that section.
